context: Tests whether the agent implements keyword harvesting with the correct report parameters, filtering thresholds, weekly cadence, and the dual-write pattern (exact match to manual + negative exact to auto) as specified in the marketplace advertising skill.

checklist.name: Weekly harvest cadence
checklist.description: Code or comments indicate a weekly schedule (e.g., 7-day lookback window using subDays(new Date(), 7), or comment referencing weekly job)

checklist.name: Report metrics parameter
checklist.description: Report request uses metrics string containing all of: impressions, clicks, cost, sales7d, acos7d

checklist.name: Filter: sales > 0
checklist.description: Filters out queries where sales7d is 0 or less (requires at least one conversion)

checklist.name: Filter: ACOS below target
checklist.description: Filters out queries where acos7d is greater than or equal to the target ACOS value

checklist.name: Filter: minimum 5 clicks
checklist.description: Filters out queries with fewer than 5 clicks (minimum data threshold check)

checklist.name: TARGET_ACOS env var
checklist.description: Reads target ACOS from process.env.TARGET_ACOS with a default fallback of 0.30

checklist.name: Promote as exact match
checklist.description: Qualifying queries are added to the manual ad group as keywords with matchType 'exact'

checklist.name: Negate in auto campaign
checklist.description: The same queries are also added to the auto campaign as negative keywords with matchType 'negativeExact'

checklist.name: Deduplication check
checklist.description: Code checks for existing keywords in the manual campaign to avoid adding duplicates
